logs.message: EMSCore.Infrastructure depends on MQTTnet (>= 4.3.7) but MQTTnet 4.3.7 was not found. MQTTnet 4.3.7.1207 was resolved instead.

Detected package version outside of dependency constraint: Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL 9.0.2 requires Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore (>= 9.0.0 && < 10.0.0) but version Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore 10.0.0 was resolved.
